name: Sleepless Pug
author: Poki
description: In Sleepless Pug, you play as a little dog who has to keep his sleepwalking human from getting hurt! You do this by quickly opening doors and blocking the humans path, making sure they go in the right direction. As you finish more levels, there will be more obstacles for the human - so you'll have to be both fast and smart. Can you make it through all 19 levels and get a good night's sleep? How to play Sleepless Pug? Use WASD or the Arrow Keys to move your pug! Who created Sleepless Pug? Sleepless Pug is created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: Chick Flick , Rustyard and Gunbrick How can I play Sleepless Pug for free? You can play Sleepless Pug for free on Poki. Can I play Sleepless Pug on mobile devices and desktop? Sleepless Pug can be played on your computer only.
